scripts.build: npm run build:sdk && npm run build:cli && npm run build:app
scripts.check: npm run check:sdk && npm run check:cli && npm run check:app
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run test:live
scripts.dev: npm run build:sdk:no-check && npm --workspace GemmaDesktopApp run dev
scripts.dist: npm run build:sdk:no-check && npm --workspace GemmaDesktopApp run dist
scripts.lint: npm run lint:sdk && npm run lint:cli && npm run lint:app
scripts.pack: npm run build:sdk:no-check && npm --workspace GemmaDesktopApp run pack
scripts.test: npm run test:sdk && npm run test:cli && npm run test:app
scripts.test:live: npm run test:sdk:live && npm run test:app:live
scripts.test:full: npm run test:default && npm run test:live
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:sdk && npm run typecheck:cli && npm run typecheck:app
scripts.typecheck:sdk: npm --workspace GemmaDesktopSDK run typecheck && npm --workspace GemmaDesktopSDK run typecheck:tests
